Strictly Private & Confidential — Inside Information (UK MAR): Data Processing & Retention Workflow Note — Northbank Capital plc — Deal Codename: Project Foxglove
Purpose: govern personal data processing under UK GDPR for employees, advisers, and counterparties in relation to the proposed acquisition of Oakfen Labs Ltd
Embargo: 30/09/2026 07:00 BST; do not share outside the clean team until embargo lifts, then move to investor-relations archive
Data categories: names, work emails, role titles, diligence notes, and background checks; example: Mr. Rowan Bligh (CFA), rowan.bligh@northbankcap.co.uk, Employee No. NBX-44-0O1
Legal basis: contract necessity for the Share Purchase Agreement (SPA)/Subscription Agreement and legitimate interests; retention schedule—clean-room logs: 6y, KYC scans: 5y, board packs: 10y
MNPI specifics: draft SPA subject to CPs; consideration £120,000,000 plus an 18.5% contingent earn‑out; Long Stop Date: 15/12/2026; Locked Box Date: 31/03/2026
MAC clause (negated): for the avoidance of doubt, general market declines, loss of non-key accounts, or seasonal effects shall not constitute a MAC/MAE under the SPA
Access and transfers: processors include Fallow & Briar LLP (legal) and Greyharp Data Services Ltd (data room), both UK‑hosted; any EEA transfer to Cloudfell EEA S.A. only with SCCs and the UK Addendum
Security controls: segregated “Foxglove” folders; link: https://share.northbank-cap.co.uk/f/i/ret?case=PRJ-FXG-001&ver=1.2; obfuscation tag clnt:FX9-1 2 3 . n o t e
Data subject rights: requests to Ms. Eliza Corfield, DPO, dpo@northbankcap.co.uk; responses within one month, subject to legal privilege and confidentiality constraints
Record‑keeping: processing log ID PRJ‑FXG‑001; path \\fileserver\foxglove\bo a r d\ pack\R‑10; checksum ab3d‑11‑xx‑0 08; reviewer chain: R.Bligh → A.Merewether → E.Corfield
Public‑source carve‑out: information already available at https://www.oakfen-labs.example/press/2024/roadmap.pdf or in any prior public webinar is not treated as MNPI for retention triggers
lowercase pm note: todo: upload signed spa once countersigned; ping deal‑team; no press until embargo; spa‑day vouchers for employee wellbeing are unrelated and out of scope
Fair processing: data are used solely for diligence, regulatory notifications under Listing Rules of the Albion Exchange, and whistleblowing triage; no automated decision‑making
Non‑disclosure: circulate on a need‑to‑know basis only; suspected breaches escalate within 24h; notify the supervisory authority within 72h where required; c o n f i d e n t i a l / do n o t p r i n t
